value.0: The wearer's arcane spells per day are doubled for one specific spell level. A ring of wizardry I doubles 1st-level spells, a ring of wizardry II doubles 2nd-level spells, a ring of wizardry III doubles 3rd-level spells, and a ring of wizardry IV doubles 4th-level spells. Bonus spells from high ability scores or school specialization are not doubled.
This amulet grants an enhancement bonus of +1 on attack and damage rolls with unarmed attacks and natural weapons.
This stone is empowered to restore many power points to a manifester.
This stone is empowered to restore some power points to a manifester.
This stone is empowered to restore several power points to a manifester.
This stone is empowered to restore a few power points to a manifester.
This stone is empowered to restore a large power points to a manifester.
This wagon was likely built to transport merchant goods. Now it helps in the grim duty of disposing of the plague-dead.

Use the Combat Dummy to try out your weapons, or just to take out some aggression on a helpless dummy.

Attack the Combat Dummy to start a training session. Your hits and damage will be tracked during the session. At the end of the session, the Combat Dummy will tell you your average damage per hit.
